releaseNotes:
- Introduced Top, Trending, and Latest JioSaavn online playlists.

- Team Netra

changelog.text: Complete overhaul of Android TV UI/UX for a cleaner and smoother experience.
Improved Android TV navigation with smoother D-Pad controls and a TV-friendly virtual keyboard.
Fixed issue where the Mobile-to-TV QR code sometimes didn’t appear.
Music Party UI improved with quick room code copy, live user count, and fast join option.
App now starts in Dark Mode with a redesigned Changelog viewer in Settings.

lockMessage: The app is temporarily locked for maintenance. Please check back later.
